O.name: Oily
O.desc: Active sebum production makes skin prone to shine and greasiness.

D.name: Dry
D.desc: Low sebum production leads to tightness and dry patches.

S.name: Sensitive
S.desc: Skin is prone to redness and breakouts from external irritants.

R.name: Resistant
R.desc: Skin barrier is strong and resists external irritants well.

P.name: Pigmented
P.desc: Prone to hyperpigmentation such as dark spots and melasma.

N.name: Non-pigmented
N.desc: Low tendency for hyperpigmentation; even skin tone.

W.name: Wrinkle-prone
W.desc: Reduced elasticity makes skin prone to fine lines.

T.name: Tight
T.desc: Good skin elasticity with fewer visible wrinkles.
